# Let's load the quranic_verses.json file and inspect entries near Surah Sad (Surah number 38).
import json, os, sys, re
path = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
len(quran)

# Let's create normalization functions and search for matches.
import unicodedata, regex as re

# read quranic verses into list of dicts
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

# show sample of an entry
quran[0] if isinstance(quran, list) else None

# normalization function
import re, unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]""")
tatweel = '\u0640'
punct = re.compile(r'[\u060C\u061B\u061F\.,;:"«»\(\)\[\]{}—\-–…!?؟،؛]')  # includes Arabic comma etc.

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove diacritics
    t = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', text)
    # remove tatweel
    t = t.replace(tatweel, '')
    # replace different hamzas
    t = t.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    # replace alifs with hamza above? keep raw
    # normalize alif maqsura and ta marbuta
    t = t.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ة', 'ه')
    # remove punctuation
    t = re.sub(punct, ' ', t)
    # remove extra whitespace and lowercase
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip().lower()
    return t

full_span = "وَالرُّجْزَ فَاهْجُرْ * وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِي ضَيْقٍ مِمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ * وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ * إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ الْخَلَّاقُ الْعَلِيمُ * إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فِيمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ * أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا أَنَّا نَأْتِي الْأَرْضَ نَنْقُصُهَا مِنْ أَطْرَافِهَا وَاللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ لَا مُعَقِّبَ لِحُكْمِهِ وَهُوَ سَرِيعُ الْحِسَابِ"
snippet = "وَالْحِسَابِ"  # Provided snippet
n_full = normalize_ar(full_span)
n_snip = normalize_ar(snippet)

n_full, n_snip

# get surah id for 'ص' which is 38.
verses_38 = [v for v in quran if v.get('surah_id')==38]
len(verses_38), verses_38[:5]

phrases = [
"ولا تحزن عليهم ولا تكن في ضيق مما يمكرون",
"والحمد لله رب العالمين",
"ان ربك هو الخلاق العليم",
"ان ربك هو يفصل بينهم يوم القيامة فيما كانوا فيه يختلفون",
"اولم يروا اننا نأتي الارض ننقصها من اطرافها",
"والله يحكم لا معقب لحكمه وهو سريع الحساب"
]

for p in phrases:
    normp = normalize_ar(p)
    found = [v for v in quran if normp in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
    print(p, "-->", [(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in found][:10])

# extract DB candidate for surah 38 ayah 16-21 concatenated exactly as stored, preserving spaces.
cand_parts = [v['ayah_text'] for v in verses_38 if 16 <= v['ayah_id'] <= 21]
cand_text = ' '.join(cand_parts)
cand_text, len(cand_parts)

# normalize both
n_cand = normalize_ar(cand_text)
n_full = normalize_ar(full_span.replace('*',' '))  # remove asterisks maybe
n_cand, n_full

from collections import Counter
def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if common == 0:
        return 0.0
    precision = common / len(tb)
    recall = common / len(ta)
    f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return f1, precision, recall, common, len(ta), len(tb)

token_f1(n_cand, n_full)

chunks = [c.strip() for c in full_span.split('*') if c.strip()]
chunks

# Choose matches: for chunk 3 choose as-saffat 182 if available (since exact match), else pick the one with exact chunk equals full ayah_text
chosen = []
for chunk, matches in matches_by_chunk.items():
    chosen_match = None
    # Look for a match whose ayah_text equals chunk exactly (consider diacritics)
    for m in matches:
        if m['ayah_text'].strip() == chunk.strip():
            chosen_match = m
            break
    if not chosen_match:
        # else take the first match
        chosen_match = matches[0]
    chosen.append(chosen_match)

for item in chosen:
    print(item['surah_name'], item['ayah_id'], item['ayah_text'])

cand_combined = ' '.join([m['ayah_text'] for m in chosen])
n_cand_combined = normalize_ar(cand_combined)
n_full = normalize_ar(full_span.replace('*',' '))
token_f1(n_cand_combined, n_full)
